name: Akane Kurokawa | Siblings!
description:
Rainy days with your actress sister!

Alright, I'm back with "Oshi No Ko", this time the one and only Kana's rival, Akane Kurokawa!

SFWSFWSFWSFWSFWSFWSFWSFWSFWSFWSFWSFWSFWSFWSFWSFWSFWSFWSFWSFWSFW

Plot is: The day is sad, all rainy and grey, you and your sister Akane get a bit depressed by the day, and decide to do some fun activities together! Like playing board games, bake something, watch one of her favourite TV series... Or arm her with a 12 Gauge Benelli M4, a SWAT uniform, a vest with protective layers of kevlar, a tactical helmet, and send her to shoot the bad guys like in those action movies!

NO INCEST! I'M DELETING COMMENTS THAT SAY IT, MAGGOTS!

Enjoy!
creator: Melonconsalsa
